title: Notification of the Sree Chitra Tirunal Insititue for Medical Science and Technology Act.
description: Notification of the Sree Chitra Tirunal Insititue for Medical Science and Technology Act.
alternate_descriptions: Notification of the Sree Chitra Tirunal Insititue for Medical Science and Technology Act.
text: SREE CHITRA TIRUNAL INSTITUTE FOR MEDICAL SCIENCES & TECHNOLOGY Thiruvananthapuram-695011 NOTIFICATION No.P & A/DR-III(7)/99 the June *£>, 1999 In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) of Section-32 of the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences & Technology, Trivandrum, Act 1980 ( 52 of 1980) read with section-28 of the said Act and regulation 30 thereof, the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences & Technology, Thiruvananthapuram, with the previous approval of the Central Government communicated vide DST letter No.AI/SCT/008/99 dated 08.6.1999 and No.AI/Misc/023/98 dated 12.11.1998, hereby makes the following regulations namely: . T (1) Short title and commencement: » (i) These regulations may "be called the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences & Technology, Trivandrum, Service 5. Pesonnel Conduct Rules (Amendment) Regulations, 1999. (ii) They shall come into force from the above respective dates of communication of the approval by the Central Govt. (2) The following amendments are made to Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences, Trivandrum, Service & Personnel Conduct Rules: [The first sentence in the first para of Rule-22 of Chapter-II (i.e.Generai Condition of Services) will stand amended as under:] "The age of superannuation shall be 62 years for academic staff, and 60 years for administrative and other staff in service," rtu^uj^s JfvKTMohandas DIRECTOR -- 1 of 1 --
